MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: The following questions ask about your personal experiences. We ask about your sensory, psychological, emotional, and social experiences. Some of these questions may seem to relate directly to your experiences and others may not. Based on your experiences within the past year, please indicate how much you agree or disagree with the following statements. Please read each question carefully and select the best answer that best describes your experiences. Please answer all questions.

prime_1.Description: I think that I have felt that there are odd or unusual things going on that I can't explain.

prime_1_dur.Description: I think that I have felt that there are odd or unusual things going on that I can't explain. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_2.Description: I think that I might be able to predict the future.

prime_2_dur.Description: I think that I might be able to predict the future. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_3.Description: I may have felt that there could possibly be something interrupting or controlling my thoughts, feelings, or actions.

prime_3_dur.Description: I may have felt that there could possibly be something interrupting or controlling my thoughts, feelings, or actions. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_4.Description: I have had the experience of doing something differently because of my superstitions.

prime_4_dur.Description: I have had the experience of doing something differently because of my superstitions. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_5.Description: I think that I may get confused at times whether something I experience or perceive may be real or may be just part of my imagination or dreams.

prime_5_dur.Description: I think that I may get confused at times whether something I experience or perceive may be real or may be just part of my imagination or dreams. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_6.Description: I have thought that it might be possible that other people can read my mind, or that I can read other's minds.

prime_6_dur.Description: I have thought that it might be possible that other people can read my mind, or that I can read other's minds. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_7.Description: I wonder if people may be planning to hurt me or even may be about to hurt me.

prime_7_dur.Description: I wonder if people may be planning to hurt me or even may be about to hurt me. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_8.Description: I believe that I have special natural or supernatural gifts beyond my talents and natural strengths.

prime_8_dur.Description: I believe that I have special natural or supernatural gifts beyond my talents and natural strengths. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_9.Description: I think I might feel like my mind is 'playing tricks' on me.

prime_9_dur.Description: I think I might feel like my mind is 'playing tricks' on me. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_10.Description: I have had the experience of hearing faint or clear sounds of people or a person mumbling or talking when there is no one near me.

prime_10_dur.Description: I have had the experience of hearing faint or clear sounds of people or a person mumbling or talking when there is no one near me. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_11.Description: I think that I may hear my own thoughts being said out loud.

prime_11_dur.Description: I think that I may hear my own thoughts being said out loud. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_12.Description: I have been concerned that I might be 'going crazy'.

prime_12_dur.Description: I have been concerned that I might be 'going crazy'. How long has it been since you first had this thought or experience?

prime_screen_selfreport_complete.Description: whether or not scale was completed

prime_total_score.Description: Global score comprised of the sum of all items prime_1 through prime_12 (does not take into account duration of symptoms). n/a if any individual item is n/a.

clinically_significant_psychosis_spectru.LongName: Clinically significant psychosis spectrum symptoms. n/a if one or more of the items prime_1 through prime_12 is n/a, or if the age of the participant at that session is <11 years old.
clinically_significant_psychosis_spectru.Description: Clinical significance is determined by meeting one or more of the following criteria: ≥1 item rated 6 (definitely agree); ≥3 items rated 5 (somewhat agree); total items 1-12 ≥ 2 SD away from mean by age (see Table 1 in Calkins et al.)
